ocr_findings.description: '試験にはコレが出る！' OCR'd as '試験にはつしが出る！' — mascot badge text 'コレ' misread as 'つし' (same recurring issue)

TCO row in the economics table: image shows 'TCO' with furigana 'ティーシーオー' as a single clean label, OCR splits it as 'コスト\nTCO' — extra 'コスト' prefix inserted before TCO, slightly garbling the row header

reviewer_notes: Page covers benchmarking vs benchmarkテスト distinction, plus (2)経済性 section with TCO table. Prose is faithfully transcribed. Table structure is mostly preserved; the TCO row header has a minor duplication artefact. The 学習のポイント box at top-right is captured correctly as a section heading.
